description: Style NoteBe the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish polo T-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and sports shoes for a casual look.Product DetailsNavy blue polo neck T-shirt, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, brand logo appliqué on left chest and vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonPre-soak the garment before washPreferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not attempt to remove stains by spot washingDrip dry on hanger and avoid wringing, or flat dryPreferably steam ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
